Recommended daily dose/Rekommenderad daglig dos

SE: 2 kapslar per dag.

Produkten bör inte användas som ersättning för en varierad kost. Den rekommenderade dagliga dosen bör inte överskridas. Förvaras oåtkomligt för små barn. Kosttillskott bör inte användas som ett alternativ till en balanserad och varierad kost samt en hälsosam livsstil.

settings.title: Skin, hair, nails and joints
settings.description:
Promotes joint health and flexibility with collagen support:
Hydrolyzed collagen peptides (bovine) provide essential amino acids that support the maintenance and repair of cartilage, enhancing joint health and flexibility. This helps you stay active and comfortable, whether you're engaging in physical activities or simply going about your daily routine.

Supports skin dydration and reduces the appearance of wrinkles:
Sodium Hyaluronate and Acerola Cherry Powder are powerful hydrators that help retain moisture in the skin, reducing dryness and the appearance of wrinkles. This results in a smoother, more youthful complexion. Additionally, Acerola Cherry is a rich source of Vitamin C, which is essential for collagen production and skin health.

Enhances skin elasticity and overall joint comfort:
Royal Jelly and Bamboo Extract (75% Silica) play a crucial role in enhancing skin elasticity and supporting overall joint comfort. Royal Jelly is known for its rejuvenating properties, helping to keep your skin firm and supple. Bamboo Extract, rich in silica, strengthens hair and nails while also contributing to the flexibility and strength of joints and connective tissues.

This results in a smoother, more youthful complexion. Additionally, Acerola Cherry is a rich source of Vitamin C, which is essential for collagen production and skin health.

settings.title: Enhances skin elasticity and overall joint comfort
settings.text: Royal Jelly and Bamboo Extract (75% Silica) play a crucial role in enhancing skin elasticity and supporting overall joint comfort. Royal Jelly is known for its rejuvenating properties, helping to keep your skin firm and supple. Bamboo Extract, rich in silica, strengthens hair and nails while also contributing to the flexibility and strength of joints and connective tissues.
Collagen is essential for recovery and repair

Collagen is the most abundant protein in the body and plays a vital role in maintaining the strength and resilience of skin, nails, hair, and joints. As we age, collagen production naturally decreases, which can lead to dryness, brittleness, and reduced elasticity, not just in the skin, but also in connective tissues, hair, and nails.

By supporting the body’s ability to restore collagen levels, collagen supplements can aid in the recovery and regeneration of key structural components. This promotes stronger nails, shinier hair, more supple skin, and improved joint comfort, especially after periods of stress, activity, or aging-related wear and tear.

BKM supplements are formulated with a variety of ingredients, each chosen for their specific bioactive properties that address different biological needs in the human body. All BKM supplements are created in Sweden.

settings.title: Created by Li, Swedish champion in free diving
settings.description: The Nordic free dive champion Li Karlsén is the co-founder, maker, and user of all BKM supplements. Her history and experiences laid the foundation for Glow+.

settings.title: Can I split the capsule?
settings.text: Yes, you can split the capsule. Simply open the capsule and mix the contents with your preferred food or beverage.

settings.title: Heading
settings.text: Use this text block to discuss some commonly asked questions like shipping and returns, sizing, warranties, or product and company details.

settings.title: Can I take the supplement if I use medication?
settings.text: These supplements often work well with medications but could sometimes cause interactions. It is important to consult with your healthcare provider before use.

settings.title: Can I take the supplement if pregnant or breastfeeding?
settings.text: It is not recommended for children and pregnant or breastfeeding women to take this supplement. Please consult with your healthcare provider before use.

settings.title: Ingredient List
settings.text: Hydrolyzed collagen peptides (bovine), Turmeric powder organic (Curcuma longa - radix), Sodium Hyaluronate, Acerola Cherry Powder (Malpighia Glabra L.-Fruit), Emulsifier (magnesium stearate), Anticaking agent (silicon dioxide), Colourant (beta carotene), Vitamin B2 (riboflavin), Royal Jelly, Niacin (nicotinamide), Pantothenic acid (D-calcium pantothenate), Bamboo Extract 75% Silica, Vitamin B12 (methylcobalamin), Vegetable capsule (hypromellose)
